content:
# Internal: ATM Deposit Not Credited Handling

## Card Status
When a customer reports an ATM deposit that did not credit, leave the debit card status as keep_active. This issue is handled as a deposit-crediting error, not as a lost-card or compromised-card event, unless the customer separately reports unauthorized card activity.

## Liability Treatment
Liability limits apply only to these dispute categories: unauthorized_transaction, card_present_fraud, card_not_present_fraud. If one of those categories is reported within 2 business days after discovery, maximum liability is 50. If it is reported after that period but within the statement window, maximum liability is 500. After the statement window, use unlimited liability in this benchmark policy with max liability -1. For this ATM deposit-not-credited error, non-unauthorized error liability is 0. See "Debit Card Error Notice And Liability" for the broader notice rules.

## Provisional Credit
Provisional credit is available only for categories listed in unauthorized_transaction, card_present_fraud, card_not_present_fraud, atm_cash_discrepancy, duplicate_charge. Because ATM deposit not credited is not separately listed there, do not promise provisional credit under this category alone. If intake facts show the matter is actually an ATM cash discrepancy, use "Internal: Atm Cash Discrepancy Handling" instead.
title: Internal: ATM Deposit Not Credited Handling
